steps.action: Legong (Balinese: ᬮᬾᬕᭀᬂ, légong) is a form of Ba with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.
steps.text: Legong (Balinese: ᬮᬾᬕᭀᬂ, légong) is a form of Ba with weight transfer through footwork, pivot turn, hold hands, partner opposite, accent beat, grounded.

steps.action: It is a refined dance form characterized by intr
steps.text: It is a refined dance form characterized by intricate finger movements, complicated footwork, and expressive gestures and facial expressions.

steps.action: When he recovered, he arranged for such dances t
steps.text: When he recovered, he arranged for such dances to be performed in reality.

steps.action: Excerpts from Legong dance dramas are put on for
steps.text: Excerpts from Legong dance dramas are put on for tourists.

steps.action: These dancers were regarded highly in the societ
steps.text: These dancers were regarded highly in the society and usually became wives of royal personages or wealthy merchants.

steps.action: They would usually stop dancing after marriage.
steps.text: They would usually stop dancing after marriage.

steps.action: However, in present, Indonesia dancers may be of
steps.text: However, in present, Indonesia dancers may be of all ages; performances by men in women's costumes are also recorded.

steps.action: The two little actresses are accompanied by a th
steps.text: The two little actresses are accompanied by a third dancer called a condong or attendant.

steps.action: She sets the scene, presents the dancers with th
steps.text: She sets the scene, presents the dancers with their fans and later plays the part of the raven.

steps.action: Legend has it that a prince of Sukawati fell ill
steps.text: Legend has it that a prince of Sukawati fell ill and had a vivid dream in which two maidens danced to gamelan music.

steps.action: Others believe that the Legong originated with t
steps.text: Others believe that the Legong originated with the sanghyang dedari, a ceremony involving voluntary possession of two little girls by beneficent spirits.

steps.action: Legong is also danced at public festivals.
steps.text: Legong is also danced at public festivals.

steps.action: They began rigorous training at about the age of
steps.text: They began rigorous training at about the age of five.

steps.action: The most common is the tale of the East Javanese
steps.text: The most common is the tale of the East Javanese king of Lasem from the Malat, a collection of heroic romances.

steps.action: He is at war with another king, the father (or b
steps.text: He is at war with another king, the father (or brother) of Princess Rangkesari.

steps.action: Lasem wants to marry the girl, but she detests h
steps.text: Lasem wants to marry the girl, but she detests him and tries to run away.

steps.action: Becoming lost in the forest, she is captured by
steps.text: Becoming lost in the forest, she is captured by Lasem, who imprisons her and goes out for a final assault against her family.

steps.action: He is attacked by a monstrous raven, which foret
steps.text: He is attacked by a monstrous raven, which foretells his death.

steps.action: The dramatics are enacted in elaborate and styli
steps.text: The dramatics are enacted in elaborate and stylized pantomime.
